sales.description:
JOVIAN, A.D. 363-364. AV Solidus (4.38 gms), Antioch Mint, 7th Officina. NGC Ch VF, Strike: 5/5 Surface: 2/5. Graffito.
RIC-222; Depeyrot-18/1. Obverse: Pearl-diademed, draped, and cuirassed bust right; Reverse: Roma and Constantinopolis, with right foot on prow and holding scepter, seated facing on throne and holding between them a shield inscribed VOT / V / MVL / X in four lines; ANTZ. A more difficult type, this example displays an even, well centered strike and pleasing coloring throughout...
